title: ToolTreaux Metal Number and Letter Stamping Set Auto Punch Storage Case - 38pc
description:
The ToolTreaux metal stamping set comes with 38 numbers, letters, and punctuation marks as well as an automated spring-loaded punch so you can begin stamping right out of the box. The kit has 26 upper case letters, number 0-9, an ampersand, and a period. The metal stamps feature a 1/8 inch face and measure 1” in length. Just press and create permanent marks on soft metals, plastic, wood, and leather materials. These tools are great for crafting, hobbies, jewelry making, and metalworking for both professionals and beginners alike. Our letter and number stamps come with a durable, molded plastic storage case to keep your tools organized and secured when not in use. Keep it inside of your toolbox, tool belt, or crafting storage organizer.

ToolTreaux Metal Number and Letter Stamping Set Auto Punch Storage Case - 38pc

The ToolTreaux metal stamping set comes with 38 numbers, letters, and punctuation marks as well as an automated spring-loaded punch so you can begin stamping right out of the box. The kit has 26 upper case letters, number 0-9, an ampersand, and a period.

Key Features

  • 38PC ASSORTED METAL STAMPING SET - ToolTreaux metal stamping set comes with 38 numbers and letters with an automated spring-loaded punch; kit includes 26 uppercase letters, numbers from 0-9, a period and an ampersand for metalworking
  • EASY TO USE - Metal stamps feature an 1/8 inch face and easily fit inside of the included automated spring-loaded punch so you can begin stamping right out of the box. Press and create permanent marks on soft metal, plastic, leather and wood materials
  • STORAGE CASE INCLUDED - Letters and numbers stamps come with a molded durable plastic storage case to keep your tools organized and secured when not in use
  • VERSATILE CRAFTING TOOLS - Number and letter stamps are must-have marking tools for crafters, hobbyists, jewelry makers and metalworkers for creating artisan craft projects; Great gift idea for professionals and beginners alike
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: metal, plastic; Stamp head size: 1/8“; Stamp length: 1”; Automated spring-loaded punch length: 6.75”; Colors, gold, chrome, red

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTLNSTAMP38PC
  • UPC: 810131702427
  • Color: Red
  • Size: 7.5 in x 5 in

The metal stamps feature a 1/8 inch face and measure 1” in length. Just press and create permanent marks on soft metals, plastic, wood, and leather materials. These tools are great for crafting, hobbies, jewelry making, and metalworking for both professionals and beginners alike.

Our letter and number stamps come with a durable, molded plastic storage case to keep your tools organized and secured when not in use. Keep it inside of your toolbox, tool belt, or crafting storage organizer.
